self_improvement.claim: Directive Workspace can improve whole-product truth quality by letting the canonical report and workbench detail inspect the structured historical Scientify Runtime follow-up directly.
self_improvement.mechanism: This DEEP Architecture case materializes active-bounded legacy Runtime follow-up compatibility inside the shared state resolver and workbench follow-up detail fallback.
self_improvement.baseline_observation: Before this DEEP opener, the structured Scientify `runtime-followup.md` artifact was still treated as a broken deferred-contract case.
self_improvement.expected_effect: Historical Runtime follow-up inspection becomes explicit, bounded, and reportable without inventing new Runtime v0 advancement.

decision.rationale: The canonical truth anchor and workbench follow-up detail should resolve the structured historical Scientify Runtime follow-up as read-only history.
decision.runtime_threshold_check: yes - the mechanism is still valuable without a runtime surface, so Architecture should retain product-owned value
